revision.comment: Add aliases for main parameters, per [[Template_talk:Update_after#Aliases|agreement at talk]]
Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>"
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects U
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||$B=<!--
##### param 1 is the year ##### param 2 is the month number ##### param 3 is the day of the month ##### optional param 4 is the category ##### optional named parameter reason= changes the tooltip text
-->{{#ifexpr: {{JULIANDAY| {{CURRENTYEAR}} | {{CURRENTMONTH}} | {{CURRENTDAY}} }} > {{JULIANDAY| {{{year|{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}-1}}}}}} | {{{month|{{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}}}} | {{{day|{{{3|{{CURRENTDAY}}}}}}}} + {{{delay|0}}} }} |{{update inline span |date={{#if:{{{year|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{month|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{MONTHNAME|{{{month|{{{2|}}}}}}}}|January}} {{{year|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |text = {{{text|}}} |reason={{{reason|The text near this tag is dated.}}} }}{{#if:{{{category|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{main other|}}}}|{{{text|}}}{{main other|}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Update after]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | delay | reason | text }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and inter-wikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:{{{category|{{{4|}}}}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles scheduled for update tagging]] [[Category:Pages using update after template with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
